Martha had been pretty lonely lately after her divorce with her ex-husband, Alfred. It just didn't work out, and since he didn't even take care of their son, the relationship ended. Now, she's sitting on a Jamaican bar Bodhi had shown her a few days ago, wondering if she's as attractive as always. Maybe she should use the techniques Bodhi showed her to find a new partner?
